# start()

**Instance Method**

Starts a test run.

## Declaration

```swift
func start()
```

## Discussion

This method must not be called more than once.

## Performing Test Runs

- **stop()**: Stops a test run.
- **record(_:)**: Records an issue during test execution for the test run.
